body: Concerning the experiment I proposed on the nature of motion and the force of gravity, I have considered your remarks and will attempt another trial.
notes: Newton to Hooke on motion and gravity.

body: Your observation regarding the comet's path is most pertinent; I shall compare it with the tables and report back at the earliest convenience.
I have devised a new method in the calculus that clarifies certain series; perhaps an experiment might settle the dispute, but time will tell.
